unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: tunnel_is_established
tunnel_is_failed
tunnel_reinit
tunnel_init
h1_tunnel_go_state
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct h1_tunnel_state *ts, h1_tunnel_state new_state, struct Curl_easy *data)

function.name: tunnel_free
tunnel_want_send
start_CONNECT
send_CONNECT
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct h1_tunnel_state *ts, bool *done)

function.name: on_resp_header
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct h1_tunnel_state *ts, const char *header)

function.name: recv_CONNECT_resp
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct h1_tunnel_state *ts, bool *done)

function.name: CONNECT_host
start_CONNECT
send_CONNECT
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct h1_tunnel_state *ts, bool *done)

function.name: recv_CONNECT_resp
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, struct h1_tunnel_state *ts, bool *done)

function.name: H1_CONNECT
cf_h1_proxy_connect
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, bool blocking, bool *done)

function.name: cf_h1_proxy_adjust_pollset
cf_h1_proxy_destroy
cf_h1_proxy_close

unit.decl_stmt: struct Curl_cftype Curl_cft_h1_proxy = { "H1-PROXY", CF_TYPE_IP_CONNECT, 0, cf_h1_proxy_destroy, cf_h1_proxy_connect, cf_h1_proxy_close, Curl_cf_http_proxy_get_host, cf_h1_proxy_adjust_pollset, Curl_cf_def_data_pending, Curl_cf_def_send, Curl_cf_def_recv, Curl_cf_def_cntrl, Curl_cf_def_conn_is_alive, Curl_cf_def_conn_keep_alive, Curl_cf_def_query, };

function.name: Curl_cf_h1_proxy_insert_after
